narrative:
Precinct Upper 4 (precinct in Lawrence County) has 348 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.5 percentage points.
